sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113642" key="xeiro/ktupos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χειρό-κτῠπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n113642.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stricken by the hand;</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">χοροιτύπος</ref> </xr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
